paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.2 as of 2026-07-23, representing a decrease of 5.85% from the prior close and 28.71% over the past 22 sessions. There has been 1 new news item in the last 24 hours.
Recent news includes an announcement from PR Newswire on 2026-07-23 regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. This news item is the only recent headline available.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K/A form on 2026-07-21 disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on 2026-07-15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been 1 Form 4 filing in the feed.
